description:
Fast, lightweight bulk RNA-seq differential expression analysis.

FlashDEG is a fast, lightweight implementation of the DESeq2 algorithm for bulk RNA-seq differential expression analysis. This package provides the FlashDEG command-line engine and desktop GUI for x86_64 Windows systems.
FlashDEG 1.1.0 Windows release with the command-line engine and desktop GUI in a single MSI installer.
